message:
test(shortcuts): add 7 Esc priority and overlay isolation tests (bd-iuvb.17.5)

Tests verify: Esc does not close help/debug/perf_hud (toggle-only),
Esc priority (palette before a11y), shortcuts consumed while palette
is open, number keys navigate screens. Total: 20 shortcut tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
